faction

Outcasts

A hostile Division 2 faction whose continued activity and developing alliance with the True Sons and Hyenas are confirmed in official seasonal material.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Verified seasonal status

The Outcasts remain an active hostile faction and enter a developing three-faction alignment with the True Sons and Hyenas in The Pact season. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The Pact identifies the Outcasts as an active faction with faction-specific Kill Squads, rewards and materials in the Retaliation system. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Official season framing says the leadership of the Outcasts, True Sons and Hyenas are forging a pact and planning a major operation. [2]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionopposed to
  • True Sonsallied with
  • Hyenasallied with

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2: The Pact — Ubisoft (2025-09-08). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 at Gamescom — Ubisoft (2025-08-21). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: This is intentionally a limited page. Origin, ideology and named leadership will not be added until direct mission or collectible evidence is captured and registered.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
